title: erigeron procerus
intro: Erigeron procerus, also known as the dwarf fleabane or prostrate daisy, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce fever. Erigeron procerus is also valued for its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and its ability to aid in digestion and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
